title: Risk Models Are Not Guarantees
prompt: Ask what assumptions, tail events, liquidity conditions, and stress scenarios the model fails to capture.

title: Financial Automation Needs Stop Rules
prompt: Check whether trading, fraud, credit, or risk systems can be paused, limited, rolled back, or retired.

title: Consumer and Market Impacts Differ
prompt: Review whether the system primarily affects individual access, market stability, institutional exposure, or systemic risk.
